questions.prompt: Which AWS service collects and monitors metrics from AWS resources?
Which service records all API calls in your AWS account?
Which service provides a history of AWS resource configuration changes?
Which service provides automated security assessments of EC2 instances?
questions.explanation: Amazon Inspector scans EC2 instances for vulnerabilities.

questions.prompt: Which service provides real-time monitoring dashboards?
questions.explanation: CloudWatch provides dashboards for metrics and alarms.

questions.prompt: Which service provides recommendations for cost optimization and performance?
questions.explanation: Trusted Advisor provides best practice checks.

questions.prompt: Which service allows you to set alarms on metrics?
questions.explanation: CloudWatch Alarms notify you when thresholds are breached.

questions.prompt: Which service provides centralized logging across multiple accounts?
questions.explanation: CloudWatch Logs aggregates logs from multiple sources.

questions.prompt: Which service allows querying logs with a SQL-like language?
questions.explanation: Logs Insights allows interactive log queries.

questions.prompt: Which service provides anomaly detection for metrics?
questions.explanation: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection uses ML to detect unusual patterns.
